name: mcp-quick-show
description: Local marketplace for the QuickShow plugin — render markdown/SVG/Mermaid/images/HTML into floating macOS HUD panels, with a markup feedback loop the user can annotate on.

plugins.name: quickshow
plugins.description: Floating HUD panels for Claude. MCP tools (show_markdown / show_svg / show_mermaid / show_image / show_html / enable_markup_events / get_markup) plus foundational + demo skills. Pairs with QuickShow.app.
